productDisplayName: Lotto Men White Basketball Mid II Sports Shoes
description: Designed for the Sports junkie who never compromises on style and comfort, the Basketball Mid II shoe from lotto comes with a durable upper and a grippy rubber outsole that keeps you stable on various surfaces.UpperSynthetic upper  with perforations on the forefoor and backfoot areaCentral lace-ups with a padded tonguePadded mesh inner with a soft footbedBranding on the tongue and the heel collarOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe region to act as the toe guardPatent leather overlay at the toe boxMetal eyelets at the midfootMidsoleFoamy rubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection with an injected air unit at the heel for better shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole Punto Flex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementExaggerated herringbone grooves all overShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
